name: Hurry-up Cheese Buns
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Combine yeast and 1 cup flour in a medium mixing bowl; set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, combine cheese spread, water, shortening, sugar, and salt. Heat to 105-115°F, stirring constantly.
3. Add the cheese mixture and beaten egg to the yeast mixture. Beat for 1/2 minute at low speed of an electric mixer, scraping sides of the bowl.
4. Beat for 3 minutes at high speed. Stir in the remaining 1 cup flour.
5. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead 1-2 minutes.
6. Shape dough into 12 balls. Place in well-greased muffin pans.
7. Cover and let rise in a warm place (85°F), free from drafts, for 1-1/2 hours or until doubled in bulk.
8. Bake at 350°F for 15-18 minutes. Yield: 1 dozen.
